navigation_log: Homepage blocked by Anubis anti-bot (JS Proof-of-Work). Tried common prayer paths (prayer-times, timetable, salah) all blocked. Used Wayback Machine: newer captures show domain hijacked to Chinese spam. Older captures (2022) reveal Jamia't Us-Salam was a Blogger site with a 'Prayer Times' nav tab linking to jamiasalam.blogspot.com/search/label/Prayer%20Times, but actual prayer timetable page was not archived and redirects return 404. No dedicated timetable asset found.
review_notes: jamiasalam.com is behind Anubis bot protection. Domain has been hijacked (Apr 2025+ shows Chinese construction company content). Old Blogger archives (2010-2022) confirm this was Jamia't Us-Salam Islamic Centre's site, with a 'Prayer Times' navigation label, but no structured timetable page, PDF, or image was ever archived. Any prayer times content that existed appears to have been blog posts tagged with the label, not a dedicated timetable.
